title: title extraction fix, blog cross-post verification, GSC check

actions.result: 25/25 blog posts confirmed live on Telegraph with Codeberg CTAs

actions.bug: cost-model article cross-posted with title '.ralph/config.yml' instead of correct frontmatter title
actions.root_cause: extract_title_and_body() matched first H1 heading (code snippet '# .ralph/config.yml') before checking frontmatter title
actions.fix: restructured priority: frontmatter title first, then H1 fallback with code-heading guard (_looks_like_code_heading)

actions.result: onpage 100/100, 92 sitemap URLs, 12.5% content gap coverage (7 gaps vs 1 covered), 0 ranked keywords, 0 backlinks

congestion_note: Hold window active until 05:56 UTC. This run executed concrete repairs (title fix + re-post) and verification (GSC check) during the hold — not measurement holds or packet generation.
next_actions: After congestion clears: consider fresh owned content or publisher discovery
PyPI README deploy still blocked (no TWINE creds) — 1498 downloads/month see stale 0.8.7 README
